caption:
💫 The neon rain slicked my synthetic skin, dripping down the collar of my haptic suit. Neon lights reflected in my cyber-eye, blurring the danger ahead.

I crouched behind the holographic ad for a synthetic love potion, my heart pounding against my ribs like a syncopated drum. The target, a corp-elite, was close—too close. His augmented muscles twitched, scanning the crowd for me.

I shifted my weight, the latex of my bodysuit whispering against the wet pavement. Underneath, my heavy curves were concealed by a sleek, tactical corset that hugged my waist and hips, hiding the fire of my lower half while my chest rose and fell with every breath. It was a tight squeeze, but I was built for this.

A drone buzzed overhead, its lens narrowing on the alley. I needed to move.

I slipped into the shadow of a dumpster, the metal cold against my thigh. The scent of ozone and synthetic perfume filled my nose. I could feel the heat radiating from the tech in my legs, humming with potential energy.

I exhaled, a soft, rhythmic sound. The suit clung to me like a second skin, accentuating the dangerous curve of my hips. Every step I took was calculated, every breath measured. The adrenaline was electric, tasting like copper on my tongue.

He turned the corner, a sleek black coat over a suit of woven Kevlar. He smiled, not seeing the shadow.

I lunged.

My arm extended, the hydraulic whine of my cyber-glove silenced by the damp air. The tech in my palm found his neural port. A spark, then silence.

He froze, eyes wide. I leaned in, whispering against his ear, feeling the heat of his pulse against his cheek.

"You wanted this?" I asked, breathless.

He shuddered.

"You found it," I finished, pulling back to reveal the glint of my eye in the dark.

#CyberpunkAdventures #NeonNights #TechGoddess #StealthMission #SciFiErotica #CyberSiren #UrbanLegend #NeonVibes #FutureFashion #CyberBabe
